words.example: I live in a big city.
I want to but I can't.
I am late because of traffic.
I was tired, so I slept.

words.word: hit the nail on the head
words.example: You hit the nail on the head.

words.word: bite off more than you can chew
words.example: Don't bite off more than you can chew.

words.word: the ball is in your court
words.example: The ball is in your court.
I am still on the fence.
We don't see eye to eye.
That's the tip of the iceberg.

words.exampleTr: Her ne kadar zor olsa da.

words.example: On the grounds that it works.

A growing body of evidence shows.
In the wake of the crisis.

words.exampleTr: Her ne kadar kısaca değinilse de.
